request: R4 + R5 — session cache for top 5 redundant endpoints (shared dashboard/js/shared/api-cache.js module) + API monitoring middleware writing to api_call_log DB table (Alembic migration) + GET /api/v1/experience/ops/api-metrics endpoint reading from api_call_log + Ops dashboard API Metrics panel (table: path, method, calls, p50, p95, errors) + aggregate_metrics.py api_metrics block for automatic Agent Builds feed

post_merge_hotfixes.description: fix(rita): correct api-cache.js import path (../../ -> ../) in 8 rita JS files — wrong path caused SyntaxError killing entire RITA module tree
fix(ops): add setEl to ops/utils.js — missing named export caused SyntaxError killing entire Ops module tree; root cause: skill template listed setEl as importable but ops/utils.js never had it
fix(rita): resolve leftover <<<<<<< conflict marker in scenarios.js — SyntaxError killing RITA main.js module tree; conflict survived the Run B merge resolution
chore(skills): add FC-IMP gate (named-import resolution check) to all 3 dashboard skill DoDs
chore(skills): add FC-MERGE gate (conflict-marker scan) to all 3 dashboard skill DoDs

qa_results.contract_check: full match — all 7 schema fields match JS r.field reads; last_called_at intentionally not rendered in table (within spec)
qa_results.fc_imp_check: pass — setEl confirmed in ops/utils.js; api confirmed in ops/api.js

human_score.notes: Accuracy 3 — post-merge hotfixes required (wrong import path, missing setEl export, conflict marker). Planning partially correct but FC-IMP/FC-MERGE issues not caught before merge.

lessons_learned: Merge before QA completed — Run B was merged at a2d57a6 before Steps 5-7 ran. QA deferred across sessions introduced a user-visible crash window.
Skill template drift — ops/utils.js never had setEl despite skill-add-ops-feature.md listing it in the import boilerplate. Skill templates must match the actual exports of the target utility files.
Conflict marker scan missing — no post-merge scan was run on dashboard/js/ after conflict resolution. A <<<<<<< survived in scenarios.js undetected until user testing.
FC-IMP and FC-MERGE gates added to all 3 skill DoDs to prevent recurrence.
